portfolioSection.lead: Selected Labsoy engagements where strategy, software, and AI come together to deliver measurable business outcomes.

projects.title: Enterprise ERP System
projects.description: Complete enterprise resource planning solution for manufacturing industry
projects.details: Developed a comprehensive ERP system handling inventory, HR, finance, and production management for a large manufacturing company with 500+ users.

projects.title: AI-Powered CCTV Analytics
projects.description: Real-time surveillance with computer vision and threat detection
projects.details: Implemented advanced computer vision algorithms for real-time threat detection, facial recognition, and behavioral analysis across 100+ cameras.

projects.title: Corporate Brand Video
projects.description: High-end corporate video production for Fortune 500 company
projects.details: Produced a cinematic corporate brand video featuring 4K drone footage, professional interviews, and post-production effects.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Multi-vendor marketplace with advanced payment integration
projects.details: Built a scalable multi-vendor marketplace supporting 1000+ sellers with integrated payment gateway, inventory management, and mobile apps.

projects.title: Predictive Maintenance AI
projects.description: Machine learning for industrial equipment failure prediction
projects.details: Developed ML models analyzing sensor data to predict equipment failures 48 hours in advance, reducing downtime by 60%.

projects.title: 3D Product Visualization
projects.description: Interactive 3D models and AR experiences for retail
projects.details: Created photorealistic 3D product models with AR integration allowing customers to visualize products in their space before purchase.

projects.title: Healthcare Patient Portal
projects.description: Secure appointment, records, and telehealth in one platform
projects.details: Delivered a role-based patient and clinic portal with encrypted messaging, scheduling, and telehealth hooks integrated with existing hospital systems.

projects.title: Enterprise Support Copilot
projects.description: RAG-based assistant for IT and customer support tickets
projects.details: Built a copilot that retrieves policy and runbooks, drafts responses, and routes complex tickets—cutting first-response time while keeping human review in the loop.

projects.title: Product Launch Event Suite
projects.description: Livestream, motion graphics, and on-site production
projects.details: End-to-end production for a global product launch: multi-camera livestream, real-time lower thirds, and post-event highlight packages for social channels.

projects.title: Warehouse & WMS Control
projects.description: Barcode-driven inventory, picking, and carrier integration
projects.details: Implemented a warehouse management layer with hand-held workflows, real-time stock levels, and direct carrier label APIs across three regional depots.

projects.title: Document Intelligence Pipeline
projects.description: OCR, classification, and data extraction for finance ops
projects.details: Automated invoice and contract processing with custom layout models, validation rules, and export into the client’s GL and approval workflows.

projects.title: Motion Design System
projects.description: Reusable brand motion for product UI and marketing
projects.details: Defined motion principles, Lottie and video specifications, and a component library for consistent animation across the web app and campaign creatives.

projects.title: API Platform & Dev Portal
projects.description: Central gateway, rate limits, and partner onboarding
projects.details: Shipped a unified API layer with key management, usage analytics, sandbox environments, and auto-generated OpenAPI documentation for external partners.

projects.title: Retail Recommendation Engine
projects.description: Real-time product ranking from behavior and seasonality
projects.details: Trained and deployed online ranking models with A/B tests and guardrails, lifting conversion on category and checkout surfaces without hurting exploration.

projects.title: Field Service Mobile App
projects.description: Offline-first jobs, signatures, and parts for technicians
projects.details: Technicians get dispatch, route optimization, and sync when back online. Integrated with work orders and customer notifications.

projects.title: Voice of Customer Mining
projects.description: Topic and sentiment on surveys, chat, and support tickets
projects.details: Pipelines to cluster feedback, track trends, and alert product owners on emerging issues with weekly executive summaries.

projects.title: Rebrand & Design System 2.0
projects.description: Visual identity, tokens, and component library in Figma
projects.details: Refreshed logo, color, and type scale; shipped a token-based design system and Storybook for marketing and product teams.

projects.title: Subscription Billing Engine
projects.description: Plans, dunning, and revenue recognition in one service
projects.details: Migrated a B2B SaaS to usage-based plans with proration, credit notes, and exports for finance—without service downtime.

projects.title: Fraud & Anomaly Scoring
projects.description: Real-time risk scores for sign-ups and card transactions
projects.details: Ensemble models with explainable features, shadow mode rollout, and guardrails to balance catch rate and false positives.

projects.title: Immersive Web Experience
projects.description: WebGL product story for global hardware launch
projects.details: Scroll-driven 3D scene, performance on mid-tier phones, and CMS-driven copy blocks for regional campaigns.

projects.title: Data Lakehouse Ingestion
projects.description: CDC, validation, and Iceberg tables for analytics teams
projects.details: Built streaming ingest with schema registry, PII redaction, and time-travel tables for the BI and ML teams to consume.

projects.title: Computer Vision QC Line
projects.description: Defect inspection on the assembly line at production speed
projects.details: Custom models on edge devices with line-side HMI, retraining loop from operator feedback, and SPC-style dashboards for plant managers.

hero.title: We Engineer Digital Momentum for Ambitious Businesses
hero.lead: Labsoy combines software engineering, AI, and automation into one execution model, so organizations can modernize operations and scale with confidence.

story.title: Built to Close the Gap Between Strategy and Delivery
paragraphs: Labsoy started with a simple observation: many teams had strong digital ambitions but fragmented execution. Strategy, software, and operations often moved in different directions.

We built Labsoy as a unified partner that can design, build, and operationalize transformation programs end to end. From architecture to automation, every decision is tied to measurable business impact.
Today, we work with growth-stage and enterprise teams that need systems to run faster, cleaner, and at scale.

milestones.text: Established as a digital delivery partner focused on software and process modernization.
Expanded into AI-enabled automation and advanced integration programs.
Scaled to full-spectrum transformation support across product, operations, and growth.

mission.title: Make complex transformation executable.
mission.body: We turn strategic intent into reliable systems, combining product-grade engineering with operational discipline.

vision.title: Set the benchmark for practical innovation.
vision.body: We envision organizations where AI, automation, and software operate as one coherent engine for growth.

items.title: Clarity Over Noise
items.body: We simplify complexity into concrete decisions, actionable plans, and accountable delivery.

items.title: Outcomes First
items.body: Every roadmap, sprint, and release is measured against business impact, not output volume.

items.title: Craft with Discipline
items.body: We build resilient systems with long-term maintainability, not short-lived shortcuts.

items.title: Partnership Mindset
items.body: We work shoulder-to-shoulder with client teams, sharing context, risks, and wins transparently.

differentiators.title: Why Teams Choose Labsoy
items: One integrated team across product, engineering, and automation delivery.
Architecture decisions grounded in operational realities and growth constraints.
Execution cadence designed for speed without sacrificing reliability.
Hands-on enablement that leaves your internal team stronger after launch.

team.title: Experts Who Build and Own the Outcome
team.body: Our team blends software architects, AI specialists, automation engineers, and growth-focused strategists. We value precision, momentum, and shared accountability.
points: Cross-functional squads aligned to product, data, and operations.
Senior technical ownership from discovery through post-launch optimization.
A culture that values direct communication and measurable progress.

trust.title: Proof Through Delivery
trust.body: Our credibility comes from repeatable execution, durable systems, and transparent collaboration.

pillars.title: Reliable architecture

pillars.title: Scalable delivery
pillars.body: Sustainable engineering that grows with your team and workload.
